[[BLOCK:slide31_shape1]]
· JASP is a graphical version of R.  
· It is considered Semi-dynamic visualization (Semi-dynamic visualization) because the interaction is a one-way street: from input to output.  
· The output can be updated by the input, but the user still cannot manipulate the output to trigger any change in other panels. For example, if you click on the graph, nothing will happen.
